Edit Unsplash images without downloading them!

🌟 Easily copy the direct URL of any free image or download it with custom parameters from Unsplash with just a click! 

🚀 Perfect for developers, designers, or anyone who wants to quickly integrate Unsplash images into their code or use them as embedded content.

🤗 Love CopySplash? Share Your Feedback!
If you enjoy using CopySplash, please take a moment to leave a review. Your feedback helps improve the extension and supports future development. Thank you for your support!

---

Key Features:

1. Instant URL Copying: A "Copy Link" button appears over each Unsplash image, allowing you to instantly copy the image URL to your clipboard.

2. Customizable URLs: Click on the extension icon to set default parameters like width, height, quality, and more using the imgix Rendering API.

3. Download with Parameters: Easily download images with your specified parameters directly to your device.

4. Profile Management for Parameters: Save up to 10 custom profiles with your favorite settings (e.g., width, height, quality, etc.). Load a saved profile to automatically populate the fields, making repetitive tasks even faster!

5. Custom Query Support: Include any additional imgix query parameters in your URL, giving you complete control over image transformations.

6. Profile Selector: Easily switch between saved profiles using a dropdown menu for seamless customization.

---

How It Works:

1. Copy Image URL: Hover over any Unsplash image and click the "Copy Link" button to copy the direct URL.

2. Customize URL: Use the extension popup to set your preferred parameters (width, height, quality, etc.) or load a saved profile.

3. Download Image: Click the "Download Image" button to save the image with your custom settings.

4. Save and Load Profiles: Save your frequently used settings with custom profile names and load them on demand.

5. Automatic author attribution – Downloaded Filenames include the photographer’s name for better crediting (e.g., made_by_[artist_name]_unsplash_[set_parameters].jpg ).

---

Example URLs:

- Direct URL**: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1508974239320-0a029497e820`
- Customized URL**: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1508974239320-0a029497e820?h=150&w=150&fit=crop`

---

🌟 Have an Idea? Submit and Vote on Features!
We’re always looking to improve! Submit your ideas for new features or vote on existing ones on our Feature Request Board: https://insigh.to/b/copysplash

---

Open-Source Project: https://github.com/dalisys/copy-splash

Feel free to dive into the code! Whether you have an idea for a new feature, want to improve the code, or help contribute, your input is welcome.

Note:  
This extension only works with free images. Paid content is excluded.

씨미 VOD 다운로드 버튼 추가 도구

씨미(CIME)의 비공식 확장 프로그램으로 VOD 다운로드 명령어를 간편하게 추출할 수 있습니다.

※ 이 확장프로그램은 씨미(https://ci.me)와 관련이 없는 개인 프로젝트입니다.





"이 영상 소장하고 싶은데...."
씨미의 멋진 영상들을 개인적으로 소장하고 싶었지만 포기하셨나요? 씨미 VOD 다운로드버튼은 클릭 한 번으로 고화질 영상 주소를 찾아내고, 즉시 실행 가능한 ffmpeg 명령어를 생성해 주는 스마트 추출 도구입니다. 이제 번거로운 작업 없이 좋아하는 스트리머의 영상을 간직하세요.




[ 주요 기능 ]

• 원클릭 버튼 생성 : 씨미 VOD 페이지 내 팔로우 버튼 옆에 'VOD 다운로드' 버튼을 자동으로 추가하여 직관적인 접근이 가능합니다.

• 실시간 주소 추출 : 페이지 새로고침 없이 다른 영상으로 이동하더라도, 분석하여 정확한 영상을 가져옵니다.

• 화질별 선택 기능 : 원본 화질부터 하위 화질까지 서버에서 제공하는 모든 화질 목록을 선택할 수 있습니다.

• ffmpeg 명령어 자동 완성 : 클릭 한 번으로 파일명(영상 제목)과 주소가 포함된 최적의 명령어를 클립보드에 복사합니다.

• FFmpeg 가이드 제공 : 초보 사용자를 위해 팝업 내에서 공식 FFmpeg 다운로드 페이지로 연결되는 바로가기 버튼을 제공합니다.




[ 주의사항 ]

현재 씨미(https://ci.me/)는 Beta 서비스 기간이며 m3u8 영상만 VOD 개시중입니다. 추후 타 플랫폼과 같이 mp4로 다운로드가 가능해질 경우 다운로드를 제공할 예정입니다.




[ 사용 방법 ]

• 씨미(ci.me) 사이트에 접속하여 로그인 합니다.

• 원하는 스트리머의 다시보기(VOD, CLIP) 페이지를 방문합니다.

[VOD]
• VOD 영상의 우측 하단 팔로우 버튼 옆의 [VOD 다운로드] 버튼을 클릭합니다.

• 화질 목록 팝업이 뜨면 원하는 화질 옆의 [ffmpeg 복사] 버튼을 누릅니다.

• 터미널(CMD 또는 PowerShell)에 붙여넣기(Ctrl+V)하여 다운로드를 시작하세요.

[CLIP]
•  새로 생긴 [다운로드] 버튼을 클릭합니다. (바로 다운로드 시작)

• 영상이 길수록 다운로드 시간이 증가합니다. (최대 30초 정도)




[ ffmpeg 다운로드 방법 ]

• 팝업창에서 ffmpeg 다운로드 버튼을 클릭하여 다운로드 페이지로 이동

• 페이지 좌측 하단 파란색 윈도우 아이콘에 마우스를 올려 "Windows builds from gyan.dev"을 클릭

• ffmpeg-git-essentials.7z 또는 ffmpeg-git-full.7z 다운로드



[ ffmpeg 사용 방법 ]

• ffmpeg 다운로드 후 패당 폴더의 ffmpeg.exe가 있는 위치로 이동

• 파일 탐색기 경로창의 경로를 지운 후  "cmd 또는 CMD"입력

• 명령 프롬프트(검은창)이 뜨면 복사한 ffmpeg 다운로드 주소를 붙여넣고 엔터

※ ffmpeg 외 다른 다운로더를 사용하셔도 됩니다.




[ 누가 설치해야 하나요? ]

• 좋아하는 스트리머의 다시보기 영상이 삭제되기 전에 개인 소장하고 싶은 분

• ffmpeg를 이용한 고화질 무손실 저장을 선호하는 파워 유저

• 씨미의 UI와 이질감 없는 깔끔한 디자인의 도구를 사용하고 싶은 분




[ 특징 ]

• 최소한의 리소스 : 브라우저 성능에 영향을 주지 않는 가벼운 스크립트로 구성되어 매우 빠릅니다.

• 네이티브 UI 디자인 : 씨미의 다크 모드 감성을 그대로 이어받아 설치 후에도 디자인적 위화감이 전혀 없습니다.

• SPA 완벽 대응 : 페이지 전체가 새로고침되지 않는 최신 웹 환경에서도 URL 변경을 감지하여 항상 최신 데이터를 유지합니다.




[ 개인정보 수집 및 보안 안내 ]

• 서버 전송 없음 : 본 확장프로그램은 사용자의 시청 기록이나 개인 데이터를 외부 서버로 전송하지 않습니다.

• 로컬 처리 : 모든 데이터는 사용자의 브라우저 내에서만 즉각적으로 이루어집니다.

• 권한 최소화 : 클립보드 복사(clipboardWrite) 외에 불필요한 시스템 권한을 요구하지 않습니다.

• 안전 : 계정 비밀번호나 쿠키 정보에 절대 접근하지 않으므로 안심하고 사용하셔도 됩니다.




[ 1.0.1 업데이트 내역]

[기능 추가]
• 채팅 다운로드 기능 추가 (VOD 다운로드 팝업에 포함)




[1.0.2 업데이트 내역]

[오류 수정]
• 클립 다운로드 로직 수정


◆ 오류가 발생하는 경우 꼭 개발자에게 제보해주시면 감사하겠습니다. ◆
Right-Click Magic: Open Tabs, View or Download Images, Hover Zoom, Search
Your custom right-click rules. Open links, view or download hi-res images, zoom on hover, search selected text, copy text & paste.

Imagine browsing, researching, and shopping without ever reaching for your keyboard. With Right-Click Magic, you can. 
Effortlessly fill forms, copy text between pages, search for ideas, and download images—all with a simple, powerful right-click. Work faster and easier, with fewer clicks and keystrokes. ✨

This extension transforms your right-click into a customizable, one-click shortcut for your most common actions, saving you time and effort on every page you visit.

What Can You Do with It? 🚀

🔗 Link Actions:
• Open Links Instantly: Simply right-click any link to open it in a new tab. No more "Right-click → Find menu item → Click".
• Powerful Modifiers: Need more control? Use Ctrl + Right-Click to open a link in an Incognito window, or Shift + Right-Click for a New Window.
• Tab Control: Customize whether new tabs open in the background or immediately become active, and where they are placed.

🖼️ Image Actions:
• Hover Zoom 🔎: Simply hover your mouse over an image to see a beautiful, full-screen preview. Perfect for quickly viewing images on shopping sites, galleries, and social media.
• One-Click Actions: Set your default right-click action on any image:
View Image: Open a stunning, full-screen overlay to see every detail.
Download Image 💾: Instantly save the image—no keyboard shortcuts needed. It intelligently finds the highest resolution version available!
Open Image: Open the image directly in a new tab.
• Works Everywhere: Our smart detection finds the image even if it's hidden under a transparent link or overlay.

✍️ Text Actions:
• Smart Selection Actions: Right-clicking with text selected is now context-aware!
  - Search Instantly 🌐: Right-click directly on selected text to search for it using your favorite engine (Google, DuckDuckGo, etc.).
Link Search Override 🔍: Need to look up the words inside a link? Highlighting a link and right-clicking it will now smartly search the selected text instead of opening the URL!
  - Copy Effortlessly 📋: Right-click anywhere else to instantly copy the selection. Perfect for moving info from one page to another without touching Ctrl+C.
• Quick Paste: Right-click inside any text field to instantly paste. Effortlessly fill out forms using the text you just copied.

Fully Customizable for You ✅
You are in complete control. Use the simple settings panel to enable, disable, and combine features to create your perfect workflow.
• Enable only the features you need.
• Choose your preferred search engine.
• Fine-tune the hover zoom delay.
• Your settings are always saved and will not be reset when the extension is updated!

Skey Keeper is a crypto wallet extension that enables users to interact with applications operating within the Skey Network ecosystem.
It can store Skey technical tokens (called SkeyUSD) necessary to perform transactions on the Skey Network Blockchain.

Skey Keeper allows users to generate SEED phrases and accounts that can be used with apps like the Key Manager, Skey bridge, and so on.

The Skey Keeper allows users to sign transactions with just a couple of clicks. Every user can create multiple wallets and switch between them on a whim. If you forget the password to the account, you can recover it from your SEED, as with any other crypto wallet.

Important! Keep your SEED phrase secure at all times. Don’t show or send it to anyone.
Use Data247 services from within your web browser!

Use Data247 services from within your web browser! The Data247 browser extension will automatically highlight phone numbers, email addresses, postal addresses, and IP addresses on web pages and allow you to look-up information about them with a single click! The following Data247 services are included:  

Text@ - From a USA/Canada phone number, get the carrier name, whether it's wireless or landline, and get the email-to-SMS and email-to-MMS gateway for wireless phones to be able to send them a message via email.

Carrier247 (International) - From any phone number worldwide, get the carrier name, whether it's wireless or landline, and the country name. 

Append247 (Email) - From a name and address, get an email address. 

Append247 (Name) - From a phone number, get the name of the person who owns it. 

Append247 (Phone) - From a name and an address, get a phone number.

Append247 (Reverse Email) - From an email address, get the name and address of the person who owns it.

Append247 (Reverse Phone) - From a phone number, get the name and address of the person who owns it. 

Do-Not-Call - Check whether a phone number appears on the Federal Do-Not-Call list.

Locate247 (IP Address) - From an IP address, get the city, state, and country where it is located. 

Verify247 (Email) - Verify an email address is valid and able to accept messages. 

Verify247 (Phone) - Verify a phone number is valid and able to receive phone calls.

Verify247 (Postal Address) - Verify a postal address is correct and conforms to USPS standards.  If it's incorrect, we'll offer a corrected address. 

Note: the Data247 browser extension requires an account with Data247.
An Overgold Wallet in your Browser
This browser extension is a wallet for OverGold https://overgold.io/
Ezra能標示網頁上的聖經依據，如：約 3:16，當鼠標移到經文依據時，就會顯示經文。

有時候，在看基督教文章時，偶然遇見作者引用聖經，只給經文依據，而沒有列出經文。有時我會翻查相關經文，但有時作者引用很多經文的話，查考就不太方便（偏偏引用很多經文的作者才不會一一列出經文）。

Ezra能解決這個問題，當鼠標移到經文依據時，就會顯示經文。這樣，查考經文就變得方便，從而對文章和聖經有更深的了解。

* 標示網頁上的中、英文聖經依據
* 支援繁體、簡體中文和合本
* 支援各種不同的經文引用格式
* 經文複製快捷鍵
* 開放源代碼(GPLv3授權)

經文複製快捷鍵：選取經文依據後，可以從右鍵菜單複製經文。

例如，選了「約 3:16｣，再點右鍵，就有選項可直接複製經文「神愛世人，甚至將他的獨生子賜給他們，叫一切信他的，不致滅亡，反得永生。」

也可以設定快捷鍵來複製：chrome://extensions/configureCommands
Kopiert alle Werte eines Dropdown-Menüs in die Zwischenablage

Do you frequently work with dropdown menus and need a quick way to copy the values? With Dropdown to Clipboard, you can select any dropdown menu on a webpage and copy all its options to your clipboard with just one click. This tool is designed to streamline tasks, save time, and make dropdown data management easy and efficient.

Key Features:

- Select any dropdown menu and instantly copy all options to your clipboard.
- Supports multiple pages without reloading your preferences.
- Automatically stores your display preferences and adjusts to show/hide the UI based on your settings.

How It Works:

1. Click the extension icon and enable the "Show window on page" option.
2. Select the dropdown you want to copy.
3. All dropdown options will be shown in a code view and automatically copied to your clipboard.

Simplify your work with dropdowns—install Dropdown to Clipboard today!
Extract and analyze fonts from any webpage, and copy the SVG, CSS or HTML code to use in your own projects.

With Inline, you can easily figure out which fonts are used in any website and use them in your own projects.

You can copy the font and its styling as an SVG file, allowing you to integrate it into your own design projects. You can also copy the whole CSS code of the font, or copy the font and its styling as an HTML code. And if you're only interested in a particular CSS property, you can copy that too.

(Please be sure to restart Chrome the first time you install Inline)
Copy the current page's title and URL with one click.

Markdown Title & URL Copier is a lightweight and handy Chrome extension that lets you instantly copy the title and URL of the current webpage as a Markdown-formatted link with just one click. Simplify your content curation, note-taking, or research process by quickly generating Markdown links for your favorite websites, blog posts, or articles with this easy-to-use browser extension.
Protects the user from having the selected text of a web page changed when they are trying to copy text

This is a Chrome plugin that protects the browser from the copy paste hack that is shown here https://marco97pa.github.io/copy-paste-hack-js/

By default a confirmation dialogue will be displayed if the copied text is different than the selected text the user can change the setting to have the copied text be auto corrected in the clipboard without confirmation.

Enhance Tailwind CSS workflow: Easily add, modify, remove, and copy classes with built-in Tailwind IntelliSense

Introducing Toolwind: Tailwind CSS DevTool Chrome Extension 🎨

Elevate your Tailwind CSS development experience to new heights with Toolwind, the ultimate Chrome extension designed for seamless class management. 🚀 Toolwind empowers developers and designers to streamline their workflow, effortlessly adding, editing, deleting, copying Tailwind classes, and even incorporating their own custom Tailwind configurations right from their browser. Say goodbye to the hassle of switching between your code editor and documentation – Toolwind brings the power of Tailwind CSS directly to your fingertips. ✨

Key Features:

Effortless Class Management 📚: 
Toolwind simplifies the process of working with Tailwind CSS classes. Browse a comprehensive library of classes, and add them to your code with just a click. Forget about the manual search and typing – Toolwind accelerates your development by reducing repetitive tasks. ⏩

Real-time Class Editing ✏️: 
Tailoring your designs has never been easier. Modify existing classes directly within the extension. Adjust attributes, values, and variations to achieve the perfect styling without the need to navigate back and forth between your code and documentation. 🎯

Quick Class Deletion 🗑️: 
Cleaning up your code is a breeze with Toolwind. Delete unwanted or unused classes from your HTML or CSS effortlessly, maintaining a clean and organized project structure. 🧹

Copy to Clipboard 📋: 
Copying classes should be as simple as it sounds. Toolwind allows you to swiftly copy classes to your clipboard, ready to be pasted into your codebase. Say goodbye to manual copying and pasting – Toolwind improves accuracy and efficiency. ✂️

Customization with Custom Tailwind Configuration ⚙️: 
Tailwind CSS offers an array of customization possibilities, and Toolwind ensures you make the most of them. Adjust breakpoints, spacing, colors, and more, all while previewing the changes in real time. Integrate your own personalized Tailwind CSS configuration to perfectly align with your project's design requirements. 🛠️

Intuitive UI 🖼️: 
Toolwind's user interface is designed with simplicity and functionality in mind. Navigating and utilizing the extension is a seamless experience, whether you're a seasoned developer or new to Tailwind CSS. 🤖

Search and Filtering 🔍: 
With a vast collection of Tailwind classes, finding the right one can be daunting. Toolwind’s search and filtering capabilities let you quickly locate specific classes, components, or utilities. 🔎


Say hello to an extension that revolutionizes the way you work with Tailwind CSS. Toolwind saves you time, enhances your efficiency, and enables you to create stunning designs with ease. Embrace the future of Tailwind development – install Toolwind and take control of your CSS workflow directly from your Chrome browser. 🌟
Convert selected image link URL into an HTML tag with src attribute on the clipboard.

Convert selected image link URL into an HTML tag with src attribute on the clipboard. Either an image, URL of an image, or link to an image can be selected. For example when a text "https://example.com/image.jpg" is selected and this extension is executed via the context menu, the string is save on the clipboard. You can in turn use this to edit your website or wherever you like. The text "https://example.com/image.jpg" in the above example can be replaced by the image itself or a link object, i.e., Link to Image in any website. Attributes: The icon of this Chrome extension was made by Freepik (https://www.flaticon.com/authors/freepik) from www.flaticon.com (https://www.flaticon.com/).
Emoti creates an easy-to-use dropdown menu for inserting emoticons.
Emoti is a chrome extension that allows users to easily save custom emoticons and insert them into text box inputs, such as Facebook status updates or tweets.
Export Gemini Canvas in the optimal format. Documents to Markdown, source code and HTML in their original format.

"Canvas to Markdown for Gemini" is a seamless tool designed to bridge the content you create in Gemini's Canvas directly into your everyday workflow.

With this extension, you can extract math formulas (LaTeX), Mermaid diagrams, tables, and more into Markdown, retaining 100% of their original structure.

We’ve also added an innovative feature for exporting source code. Since the original Canvas data lacks programming language metadata, normal exports strip away syntax highlighting. To solve this, our extension performs advanced code analysis to automatically detect and identify the language with over 90% accuracy before outputting it to Markdown.

[ Supported Languages (Covering 17 Major Languages) ] Python, C++, Java, R, JavaScript, Rust, Swift, C#, PHP, TypeScript, Ruby, Dart, Kotlin, Lua, Go, Bash, Scala

■ Limitations of the Auto-Detection Feature While this detection relies on highly advanced inference algorithms, please note the following limitations:

- Extremely short code snippets (e.g., under 30 characters): To prevent misidentification and maintain performance, auto-detection is skipped, and the code is output as a plain text block.
- Unsupported or niche languages: These may be incorrectly identified as one of the 17 supported languages or output as plain text (in such cases, please adjust the language tag manually).

All operations are processed entirely locally within your browser. This secure-by-design approach ensures your sensitive data remains safe while you download your Markdown files or copy them to your clipboard.

Disclaimer: Gemini is a trademark of Google LLC. The term "Canvas" mentioned in this extension refers to a specific feature of Gemini. This extension is an unofficial third-party tool and is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Google LLC.
Select and copy column data from web tables

A Chrome browser extension for selecting and copying column data from web tables. When you need to copy data from a specific column in a table, this extension makes it easy and efficient.

Features
🎯 Precise Column Selection: Click on any column header in a table to select the entire column
📋 One-Click Copy: Copy selected column data to clipboard with a single click
⌨️ Smart Shortcuts: Automatically detects your operating system, showing Ctrl+C for Windows and ⌘+C for Mac
🌍 Multi-language Support: Supports Chinese and English, automatically adapts to browser language
🎨 Visual Feedback: Highlights on hover, blue highlighting when selected
🎉 Copy Notifications: Elegant toast notifications when copying succeeds, auto-disappears after 2 seconds
🌐 Universal Support: Works on any webpage containing HTML tables

Usage
1、Toggle Selection Mode: On a webpage containing tables, click the extension icon, then click "Start Column Selection" to enter selection mode. The button will change to "Stop Selection"
2、Select Column: Hover over table column headers to see highlighting effect, click to select the entire column
3、Copy Data:
Method 1: Press Ctrl+C (Windows) or ⌘+C (Mac) shortcut to copy directly
Method 2: Click the extension icon, then click "Copy Selected Column" button
4、Copy Notification: When copying succeeds, a "✅ Copied successfully" notification will appear and disappear after 2 seconds
5、Stop Selection: Click "Stop Selection" button or press ESC key to exit selection mode. The button will change back to "Start Column Selection"

Meet Scribo for Google Docs—the essential tool for English and humanities teachers committed to lifting student writing skills. Grounded in research and trusted by some of the world’s most demanding education systems, Scribo's intuitive AI streamlines the time-consuming tasks of grading and feedback, freeing teachers to focus on inspiring and guiding their students.

Join the community of educators transforming their teaching with Scribo and make writing skill development effective and rewarding, one piece of feedback at a time.

Convert and copy text as Markdown with formatting preserved

The ultimate tool to copy text, links, and images as clean Markdown format directly from your browser.

How it works:
- Right-click on any text, link, or image you see online
- Choose "Copy as Markdown" from the context menu
- Paste perfectly formatted Markdown anywhere you need it

Features:
- Intelligent conversion of HTML elements to Markdown (headings, lists, formatting, tables, code blocks)
- Preserves rich text formatting like **bold**, *italic*, and ~~strikethrough~~ when copying
- Transforms links into proper Markdown syntax: [Link Text](URL)
- Converts images with complete attributes: ![Alt Text](Image_URL "Title")
- Extract-only-URLs mode for gathering multiple links as a formatted list
- Available in 47 languages - use in your native language
- Works on any website with no configuration needed
- Fast and lightweight - designed for performance
- Privacy-focused - all conversion happens locally on your device
- Simple, intuitive popup interface with easy settings
- Compatible with both light and dark browser themes

Perfect for:
- Writers, bloggers, and researchers using Markdown editors
- Developers working with GitHub, GitLab, or documentation
- Note-takers using Obsidian, Notion, or any Markdown-based app
- Anyone who needs to quickly capture formatted web content

No account required, no complicated setup. Just install and start copying perfectly formatted Markdown with a single click.

Easily copy and share Twitter/X posts for Discord and social media embeds. Support me: https://ko-fi.com/akumanotsubasa

This tool will add 2 new buttons to the button bar of all tweets / X-Posts.
The Linkbutton will copy a link to the current post preformatted to https://fixvx.com instead of https://x.com to support proper Previews on social media like Discord.
The second button will copy a direct link to the raw video of the post via fxtwitter.com instead of x.com. If the video has no video, anyone that clicks on the direct video link will be sent to the post instead.

You can also specify your own preferred domains that offer these services and split them to services that allow Videos, Text or both in the settings for the extension.

Version 1.0.2 Update:
- Fixed Positioning of the buttons
- Fixed buttons not appearing in modals
- Added Toast-Box when hitting a button to show the user the button did something

Version 1.0.2.1 Update:
Added a little oopsie in the last version that broke the modal buttons. Fixed!

Version 1.0.3 Update:
Reworked the buttons. The Video-Button now only shows on posts with a video and also has the ability to RIGHT CLICK the Video to instantly download it.
Extracts organic and ad URLs from Google Search results and copies them to the clipboard.

SERP Link Exporter is a simple Chrome extension that extracts links from Google Search results and copies them to your clipboard.

Use it to:
- Export organic results, ads, or both.
- Remove duplicate URLs.
- Remove tracking parameters like utm_*, gclid, fbclid, and msclkid.
- Export in plain text, CSV, or Markdown.

How it works:
1. Open a Google Search results page.
2. Click the extension icon.
3. Choose options and format.
4. Click “Copy to Clipboard”.

Privacy:
- Runs only on Google Search pages.
- No data is collected, stored, or sent.
- No background network requests.
Effortlessly copy anything to clipboard. Install now for quick access to snippets, no highlighting needed.

"Copy Anything to Clipboard" just got even more versatile! Now, along with effortlessly copying code snippets, this trusty extension extends its functionality to headings, tables, and lists on webpages. Here's what's new:

Heading Copying Made Easy:
With the latest update, "Copy Anything to Clipboard" adds a copy link next to headings (h2-h6) that have an ID assigned. Simply click on the copy link, and voila! The hash link associated with the heading is copied to your clipboard, streamlining your navigation experience.

Table Copying Options Galore:
Copying table data has never been more convenient. "Copy Anything to Clipboard" offers three ways to copy table content:
1. Copy Array: Transfer table data seamlessly into an array format.
2. Copy CSV: Convert table data into CSV format with just a click.
3. Copy Markdown: Copy tables in Markdown format effortlessly.

Effortless List Copying:
Whether it's an unordered list (<ul>) or an ordered list (<ol>), "Copy Anything to Clipboard" has you covered. Easily copy list content with a simple click, enhancing your productivity while browsing.

Why Upgrade to the Enhanced "Copy Anything to Clipboard"?

1. Expanded Functionality: With support for headings, tables, and lists, this extension becomes an indispensable tool for managing various types of content on the web.
2. Streamlined Navigation: Copy hash links for headings with ease, simplifying your browsing experience.
3. Diverse Table Copying Options: Choose your preferred format for copying table data, whether it's an array, CSV, or Markdown.
4. Enhanced Productivity: Save time and effort by quickly copying headings, tables, and lists directly from webpages.
5. User-Friendly Design: Enjoy a clutter-free browsing experience with intuitive copy links and buttons seamlessly integrated into webpage elements.

In summary, the enhanced "Copy Anything to Clipboard" is a must-have companion for anyone interacting with diverse content types online. Upgrade today and discover the convenience of effortless content copying at your fingertips. Simplify your browsing journey with "Copy Anything to Clipboard."
